latest.title: Monkeys wash food when grit gets annoying

latest.title: Grand Prismatic steam blast
latest.script_key: my favorite part the grand prismatic isn t a volcano just water superheated underground which is why it s rainbow colored watch the steam blast straight up that s the heat pushing through like a geyser before it settles back into a quiet pool isn t that wild

latest.title: steam vents bubble under Himalayan lake
latest.script_key: this lake hides a volcano under steaming vents bubble through the ice like a kettle left on too long that s why it stays liquid in the himalayas heat from below fights the freeze watch this one twice

latest.title: green jungle growing inside bangladesh crater
latest.script_key: a jungle grows inside a bangladesh crater the slopes stay lush green because steam vents release warm moist air no lava in sight that constant vapor is water not fire feeding the roots all year long
